title: SkyDeck.ai & Hugging Face: Integration for Businesses
description: SkyDeck.ai allows your business to deploy its custom LLM to all of its stakeholders and employees in a matter of minutes. Everyone will have a familiar and easy-to-use user interface to your LLM.
h1: SkyDeck.ai & Hugging Face: Integration for Businesses
html:
Why does it matter for businesses?

SkyDeck.ai allows your business to deploy its custom LLM to all of its stakeholders and employees in a matter of minutes. Everyone will have a familiar and easy-to-use user interface to your LLM.

It’s important to consider how this integration relates to a business developing LLMs with a vision to deploy them for anyone in their organization, their partners, and their end-users/customers. Private, even commercial, Large Language Models (LLMs) need better, safer, and more secure ways for users to interact with them.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming the business landscape, offering unprecedented operational efficiency and growth opportunities. A host of studies report significant increases in productivity across many domains when workers are given access to Generative AI. SkyDeck.ai is a secure business-first AI productivity platform. We are committed to enabling organizations of any size to deploy AI tools with security, control, and visibility – without vendor lock-in. The recent integration with Hugging Face, a leading AI and machine learning platform, marks another significant step for SkyDeck.ai, enhancing its AI infrastructure and expanding its AI offerings.

SkyDeck.ai: A Versatile AI Business Tool

SkyDeck.ai stands out for its versatility and adaptability in the AI landscape. It provides businesses with access to a growing variety of AI models. This currently includes ChatGPT, GPT-4, GPT-3.5, and Anthropic Claude, as well as supporting proprietary models. This reduces a business’s dependency on a single AI provider, catering to diverse business needs and promoting a more flexible AI strategy.

In addition to offering a range of AI models, SkyDeck.ai places a strong emphasis on AI security. Key features such as Data Security with encryption in motion and at rest, Data Loss Prevention (DLP), and Single Sign-On (SSO), logging, and analytics to ensure compliance with IT security standards, like SOC 2, providing businesses with a secure, scalable, and reliable enterprise AI platform.

SkyDeck.ai & Hugging Face Integration: Amplifying AI Capabilities

The integration of SkyDeck.ai with Hugging Face significantly amplifies SkyDeck.ai’s AI operations, boosting its AI deployment capabilities. Hugging Face, renowned for its commitment to democratizing machine learning, offers a vast array of AI resources. Services range from providing access to thousands of models, datasets, ML demos, to offering MLOps solutions such as fine-tuning, deployment services, and APIs.

Through this integration, users can access their Hugging Face inference endpoints directly through SkyDeck.ai’s user-friendly interface.

Collaborative AI for Dynamic Teams

SkyDeck.ai’s platform promotes AI collaboration, allowing multiple team members to engage in a unified AI conversation. This feature is designed to foster shared understandings, facilitate collaborative projects, and seamlessly integrate other colleagues. The platform also enables the automation of essential business tasks, with the added advantage of sharing outcomes with the team via Slack and email. This makes it an invaluable tool in fostering a collaborative AI workplace.

Future-Proofing Businesses with AI

The integration of SkyDeck.ai and Hugging Face promises to enhance operational efficiency and drive innovation. It signifies a commitment to the evolution of AI, offering businesses future-proof AI solutions. With this partnership, SkyDeck.ai continues to cement its position as a leading AI solution provider, offering AI strategy tools that are adaptable, efficient, and effective.

More Information:

Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/skydeckai

Documentation: https://docs.skydeck.ai/en/control-center/setup-guide/set-up-integrations/adding-huggingface-credentials

Integrate Hugging Face LLMs to SkyDeck AI with Ease
